ast.source: Model used for OpenAI analysis, chat, goals, songs, and prompts.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a recommended model or type any Ollama model name. This downloads the model to this computer through the local Ollama server, then selects it for The Deleometer.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Redacts email addresses, web links, phone numbers, and simple street addresses before text leaves Obsidian. This is a helper, not perfect anonymization.
ast.target: 在文本离开 Obsidian 之前，对电子邮件地址、网页链接、电话号码和简单街道地址进行脱敏处理。这是一个辅助工具，并非完美的匿名化方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep a continuing local author memory summary. Turn this off if you do not want ongoing memory stored in plugin data.
ast.target: 保持持续的本地作者记忆摘要。如果您不希望将持续记忆存储在插件数据中，请关闭此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the local author memory summary is included in AI prompts. Disable this to keep memory local only.
ast.target: 启用后，本地作者记忆摘要将包含在 AI 提示中。禁用此选项可将记忆仅保留在本地。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, saved reflective assessment profiles can be included in AI prompts. Disable this to keep them local only.
ast.target: 启用后，已保存的反思性评估配置文件可包含在 AI 提示中。禁用此选项可将其仅保留在本地。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off by default. If disabled, perspective chat receives excerpts plus the selected analysis, not the entire journal entry.
ast.target: 默认关闭。如果禁用，视角聊天将接收摘录和选定的分析，而非整个日记条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After philosophy re-accumulation, generate a positive song sketch with lyrics and a locally rendered audio file.
ast.target: 在哲学重新累积后，生成一个带有歌词和本地渲染音频文件的积极歌曲草图。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You generate one reflective journaling prompt at a time. The prompt should feel fresh, specific, emotionally intelligent, and motivating without sounding generic. Return plain text only, no markdown list, no title, no quotation marks.
